# Binaries

The offered binaries are statically built and therefore should run on most systems released in the last 10 years without additional dependencies.
The binaries can simply be downloaded and executed, possibly after making them executable, e.g., with `chmod u+x <downloaded-binary>`.
The binaries contain a command line interface similar to `gzip`. See, e.g., `rapidgzip --help`
The AppImages can be downloaded, made executable with `chmod u+x *.AppImage`, and executed directly to start ratarmount.
